channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Donaufelder Straße 67
item.description: only in the idle time of the tram. [19.04.2026 – 26.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
only in the idle time of the tram.
[19.04.2026 – 26.06.2026]

item.title: U2/U5: Volksgartenstraße 2
item.description: The Volksgartenstraße between the Hansenstraße and the Museumstraße will block a lane in order to handle the construction site traffic for the underground construction. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
The Volksgartenstraße between the Hansenstraße and the Museumstraße will block a lane in order to handle the construction site traffic for the underground construction.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: Gentzgasse from Aumannplatz and Lazaristengasse to Köhlergasse
item.description: Since also the affected tram lines in the period of the 4. The track construction works in the Währinger Straße from the ON 125 to the Aumannplatz, on the Aumannplatz from the … [27.04.2026 – 12.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Since also the affected tram lines in the period of the 4. The track construction works in the Währinger Straße from the ON 125 to the Aumannplatz, on the Aumannplatz from the …
[27.04.2026 – 12.07.2026]

item.title: Matzleinsdorfer Platz 3-4 to 5
item.description: In the course of the underground construction is since 28. March 2022, 09:00 o'clock the right turn lane towards 5. District on the departure ramp of the Margaret belt coming from Hauptbahnhof to … [Since 27.03.2022]
item.content:encoded:
In the course of the underground construction is since 28. March 2022, 09:00 o'clock the right turn lane towards 5. District on the departure ramp of the Margaret belt coming from Hauptbahnhof to …
[Since 27.03.2022]

item.title: Brünner Straße from Schloßhofer Straße and Am Spitz to Karl-Schäfer-Straße
item.description: The stop Peitlgasse (direction Floridsdorf) of the public transport concerned is to Brünner Straße ON. construction phase 1 of 4 … [Since 11.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop Peitlgasse (direction Floridsdorf) of the public transport concerned is to Brünner Straße ON. construction phase 1 of 4 …
[Since 11.05.2026]

item.title: U4: Front Zollamtsstraße from Marxergasse and Small Marxerbrücke to Unnamed Traffic Area and Wheel
item.description: Due to the renovation of the tunnel ceiling of the U4 line or the necessary preparatory work in the road area as well as the repair of shafts by the Vienna … [Since 01.02.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to the renovation of the tunnel ceiling of the U4 line or the necessary preparatory work in the road area as well as the repair of shafts by the Vienna …
[Since 01.02.2026]

item.title: Frauenstiftgasse crossing Baumergasse to Haspingerplatz
item.description: The stop Haspingerplatz of the affected public transport will be merged with Discontinued and the station Baumergasse. [Since 22.03.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop Haspingerplatz of the affected public transport will be merged with Discontinued and the station Baumergasse.
[Since 22.03.2026]

item.title: Antonsplatz from 13 to 18
item.description: The pipe laying work is carried out during the night during the idle time of public transport, while keeping a minimum of 2,50 m wide residual runway. [18.03.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work is carried out during the night during the idle time of public transport, while keeping a minimum of 2,50 m wide residual runway.
[18.03.2026 – 30.06.2026]

item.title: Universitätsstraße crossing Landesgerichtsstraße and Garnisongasse
item.description: Transport measures are largely taken over by the construction works metro, also in the streets of the lower road network. [Since 03.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Transport measures are largely taken over by the construction works metro, also in the streets of the lower road network.
[Since 03.05.2026]

item.title: Matzleinsdorfer Platz under structure ÖBB
item.description: In order to improve and increase the safety measures during the tunnelling work of the underground construction, one of the two … will be placed under the bridge structure of the ÖBB [Since 14.03.2021]
item.content:encoded:
In order to improve and increase the safety measures during the tunnelling work of the underground construction, one of the two … will be placed under the bridge structure of the ÖBB
[Since 14.03.2021]
